SELECT bitmapToArray(bitmapSubsetInRange(bitmap_value, toUInt32(0), toUInt32(32))) AS res FROM test_bitmap;
SELECT bitmapToArray(bitmapSubsetInRange(bitmap_value, toUInt32(10), toUInt32(20))) AS res FROM test_bitmap;
SELECT bitmapToArray(bitmapSubsetInRange(bitmap_value, toUInt32(30), toUInt32(100))) AS res FROM test_bitmap;
SELECT bitmapToArray(bitmapSubsetInRange(bitmap_value, toUInt32(200), toUInt32(500))) AS res FROM test_bitmap;
SELECT bitmapToArray(bitmapSubsetInRange(bitmap_value, toUInt32(0), toUInt32(500))) AS res FROM test_bitmap;
SELECT bitmapToArray(bitmapSubsetInRange(bitmap_value, toUInt32(5), toUInt32(5))) AS res FROM test_bitmap;
CREATE TABLE test_data (id UInt32, bitmap_value AggregateFunction(groupBitmap, UInt32));
INSERT INTO test_data VALUES (1, bitmapBuild([1, 2, 3])), (2, bitmapBuild([4, 5, 6]));
SELECT id, bitmapToArray(bitmapSubsetInRange(bitmap_value, toUInt32(2), toUInt32(5))) AS res FROM test_data;
SELECT id, bitmapToArray(bitmapSubsetInRange(bitmap_value, toUInt32(0), toUInt32(10))) AS res FROM test_data WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, bitmapToArray(bitmapSubsetInRange(bitmap_value, toUInt32(6), toUInt32(7))) AS res FROM test_data WHERE id = 2;
